name: @websitelabs/software-teams-engine
description: Software Teams Team Engine — headless broker that runs a persistent team of harness panes (Claude Code) and brokers messages between them.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && bun run build:proxy && bun run build:hook && bun run build:tmux
scripts.team:tmux: bun run build:proxy && bun run build:hook && bun run build:tmux && node dist/launch-tmux.mjs
scripts.verify:mcp: bun run build:proxy && bun build src/__mcp__/smoke.ts --target=node --outfile .mcp-smoke.mjs && node .mcp-smoke.mjs
